title: Stop testing your SAAS manually
summary: KaneAI is an automated testing platform for SaaS applications that accepts plain English descriptions of tests, generates and runs them automatically, and reports results. It aims to reduce manual QA effort and testing costs by automating the full testing pipeline.
writeup: This video covers KaneAI, an automated testing platform for SaaS applications that takes test descriptions written in plain English, then generates, runs, and reports on those tests automatically. The framing positions it as a replacement for manual QA across the full testing pipeline. The stated payoff is reduced manual testing effort and lower testing costs.
